meta.description: Database and Storage packages for Standard Library 2.0

objective: Implement panther.database and panther.storage packages with SQLite and file-backed key-value storage

DatabasePackage.description: SQLite database operations including queries, transactions, prepared statements, schema introspection

StoragePackage.description: File-backed key-value storage with JSON, batch, prefix, TTL, and collection support

CollectionsPackage.changes: Removed object_keys/values functions (language doesn't support object iteration)

panther_implemented_logic.description: All 49 functions implemented in .pan files under stdlib/panther/*/__init__.pan
panther_implemented_logic.pattern: Self-hosted PantherLang wrappers that delegate to Python-backed stdlib primitives

host_abi_primitives.description: No new Host ABI primitives required. All package functions delegate to existing Python-backed stdlib functions which use existing Host ABI backends where available (native_time, native_filesystem, native_crypto).

native_backends.description: No new native backends. Existing backends (libc, libcrypto) used transitively via existing stdlib functions.

python_fallbacks.description: All 49 functions ultimately delegate to Python-backed stdlib functions in compiler/stdlib/functions.py. These functions have native fallbacks where applicable (time, sleep, read_file, write_file, file_exists, mkdir, sha256).

full_regression.note: All existing test suites pass without regression

example_results.description: Package functions verified working in PantherLang programs
example_results.sample_database: panther main { let conn = panther_database_open("test.db"); panther_database_execute(conn, "CREATE TABLE t (id INT, name TEXT)"); panther_database_execute(conn, "INSERT INTO t VALUES (1, 'test')"); let rows = panther_database_query(conn, "SELECT * FROM t"); print(len(rows)); }
example_results.sample_storage: panther main { let store = panther_storage_open("/tmp/mystore"); panther_storage_put(store, "key1", "value1"); print(panther_storage_get(store, "key1")); }

known_limitations: Object iteration not supported: Language doesn't support 'for k in obj' — panther_database_row_keys returns empty array
Backup is stub: panther_database_backup returns false (requires native backend)
TTL cleanup manual: panther_storage_cleanup_expired must be called explicitly
Object keys/values removed: panther_collections_object_keys/values removed from collections (language doesn't support object iteration)
